Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d[0]['pg_get_functiondef'] if d else 'not found'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/yeljxgewqvjkqgagkrzs/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_b3624830267d577d70213919af94abb4dc18038c' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-raw '{"query": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_order_with_items\(p_user_id uuid, p_restaurant_id uuid, p_customer_name text, p_customer_phone text, p_customer_email text, p_delivery_address text, p_order_type text, p_table_id uuid, p_order_method text, p_items jsonb, p_total numeric, p_discount_breakdown jsonb, p_promo_code_id uuid, p_delivery_data jsonb, p_restaurant_data jsonb\) RETURNS jsonb LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $function$ DECLARE v_order_id uuid; v_order record; v_item jsonb; BEGIN INSERT INTO public.orders \(user_id, restaurant_id, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email, delivery_address, type, table_id, order_method, order_type, total, discount_breakdown, promo_code_id, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted\) VALUES \(p_user_id, p_restaurant_id, p_customer_name, p_customer_phone, p_customer_email, p_delivery_address, p_order_type, p_table_id, p_order_method, p_order_type, p_total, p_discount_breakdown, p_promo_code_id, '\\''pending'\\'', now\(\), now\(\), false\) RETURNING id INTO v_order_id; FOR v_item IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements\(p_items\) LOOP INSERT INTO public.order_items \(order_id, menu_item_id, quantity, price, notes, selected_variants, created_at, is_deleted\) VALUES \(v_order_id, \(v_item->>'\\''menu_item_id'\\''\)::uuid, \(v_item->>'\\''quantity'\\''\)::integer, \(v_item->>'\\''price'\\''\)::numeric, v_item->>'\\''notes'\\'', CASE WHEN v_item->>'\\''selected_variants'\\'' IS NOT NULL THEN \(v_item->>'\\''selected_variants'\\''\)::jsonb ELSE NULL END, now\(\), false\); END LOOP; IF p_order_type = '\\''delivery'\\'' AND p_delivery_data IS NOT NULL THEN INSERT INTO public.delivery_orders \(order_id, customer_id, status, payment_method, mobile_money_type, payment_screenshot_url, payment_status, delivery_fee, estimated_delivery_time_text, distance_km, calculated_delivery_fee, quarter_name, total_amount, restaurant_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted\) VALUES \(v_order_id, \(p_delivery_data->>'\\''customer_id'\\''\)::uuid, '\\''pending'\\'', p_delivery_data->>'\\''payment_method'\\'', p_delivery_data->>'\\''mobile_money_type'\\'', p_delivery_data->>'\\''payment_screenshot_url'\\'', COALESCE\(p_delivery_data->>'\\''payment_status'\\'', '\\''unpaid'\\''\), COALESCE\(\(p_delivery_data->>'\\''delivery_fee'\\''\)::numeric, 0\), p_delivery_data->>'\\''estimated_delivery_time_text'\\'', COALESCE\(\(p_delivery_data->>'\\''distance_km'\\''\)::numeric, 0\), COALESCE\(\(p_delivery_data->>'\\''calculated_delivery_fee'\\''\)::numeric, 0\), p_delivery_data->>'\\''quarter_name'\\'', p_total, p_restaurant_id, now\(\), now\(\), false\); ELSIF p_restaurant_data IS NOT NULL THEN INSERT INTO public.restaurant_orders \(order_id, customer_id, status, payment_method, mobile_money_type, payment_screenshot_url, payment_status, restaurant_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted\) VALUES \(v_order_id, \(p_restaurant_data->>'\\''customer_id'\\''\)::uuid, '\\''pending'\\'', p_restaurant_data->>'\\''payment_method'\\'', p_restaurant_data->>'\\''mobile_money_type'\\'', p_restaurant_data->>'\\''payment_screenshot_url'\\'', COALESCE\(p_restaurant_data->>'\\''payment_status'\\'', '\\''unpaid'\\''\), p_restaurant_id, now\(\), now\(\), false\); END IF; SELECT * INTO v_order FROM public.orders WHERE id = v_order_id; RETURN jsonb_build_object\('\\''order_id'\\'', v_order_id, '\\''order'\\'', to_jsonb\(v_order\)\); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN RAISE EXCEPTION '\\''%'\\'', SQLERRM; END; $function$"}')
